CustomField.description: Defines the relationship direction between this object mapping and its predecessor. Determines how the data import process links the created records: Parent means this record is the parent, Child means this record looks up to the predecessor, No Predecessor means this mapping has no dependency.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select whether this object is the Parent, Child, or has No Predecessor relationship to the predecessor object mapping.
CustomField.label: Relationship To Predecessor
